description_long: This bungalow is a two-story residential building with a combination of brick and painted siding on its exterior walls. The front facade features large, multi-pane windows and a prominent entryway, flanked by manicured shrubs and a mailbox. The roof is a mix of gable and flat sections, with gray shingles covering the main areas. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and includes a driveway leading to a carport or garage, as well as a small yard with several mature trees and a hot tub. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a more private garden area, with the backyard enclosed for privacy. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a comfortable suburban home.
description: A two-story bungalow with brick and painted siding, large windows, a gabled roof, and a fenced yard with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, mailbox, and manicured landscaping.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the driveway, carport or garage, hot tub, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_2: Backyard view with a fenced garden, additional windows, and a more private green space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, flat roof section, and more trees along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
